channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania, Malawi, and Mozambique Start Joint Project to Restore Ruvuma River Basin and Support Local Communities
item.description: Tanzania together with Malawi and Mozambique have started a regional project worth USD 7.12 million to strengthen integrated management of the Ruvuma River Basin and its coastal areas. The project, le...

item.title: Ondo Police Commissioner Adebowale Lawal Removed Over Alleged Extortion, New CP Appointed
item.description: The Nigerian Police have removed Adebowale Lawal from his position as Commissioner of Police in Ondo State, following allegations that he imposed a monthly N2 million levy on his subordinates. Lawal, ...

item.title: Wealth advisers warn of key tax changes affecting high-net-worth Australians
item.description: The latest federal budget has prompted concern among Australia's wealthiest, with new tax measures signalling a shift in private capital management. Wealth advisers have highlighted three main areas c...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte criticizes President Marcos over Senate and national disorder
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte publicly criticized President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., saying he is responsible for the disorder in the Senate and the broader political climate in the Philippines. During a r...

item.title: Sean Duffy's Family Road Trip Reality Show Funded by Companies Under His Oversight
item.description: Sean Duffy, President-elect Donald Trump's nominee for U.S. Transportation Secretary, is facing scrutiny over a reality TV project. Duffy filmed a family road trip series called 'The Great American Ro...

item.title: Andy Burnham aims to re-enter Parliament following Wes Streeting's resignation
item.description: Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Greater Manchester, has announced his intention to return to the House of Commons after Labour MP Josh Simons agreed to resign, enabling him to stand for the Makerfield seat...

item.title: Economist Panagariya Supports Market-Based Petrol Pricing Amid PM Modi's Request
item.description: Arvind Panagariya, a renowned economist and former Vice-Chairman of NITI Aayog, has commented on the recent appeal by Prime Minister Narendra Modi regarding petrol prices. Panagariya argued that while...

item.title: National March for Life Rally Highlights Calls to Uphold Human Life in Canada
item.description: On Thursday, Parliament Hill in Ottawa hosted the annual National March for Life, where speakers urged Canada to improve protections for human life, addressing topics such as medical assistance in dyi...

item.title: Former Meru Governor Kiraitu Murungi Mourns Passing of Youngest Daughter
item.description: Former Meru Governor Kiraitu Murungi is in deep mourning following the death of his youngest daughter, Anita Kendi Kiraitu, who passed away after a brief illness. The tragic news has sparked widesprea...

item.title: Ontario’s New FOI Law Limits Access to Health Ministry Records Amid Hospital Budget Cuts
item.description: Ontario’s recently passed freedom-of-information (FOI) legislation has further restricted public access to government records, affecting a request for documents that could reveal potential hospital bu...

item.title: Wisconsin Democrats Consider Redistricting to Gain House Seats
item.description: Wisconsin Democrats are exploring an aggressive mid-decade redistricting strategy if they secure unified control of the state government in the upcoming election. This plan could potentially result in...

item.title: Rivers Deputy Governor Appreciates PH City One Love Humanitarian Feeding Program
item.description: The Rivers State Deputy Governor, Professor Ngozi Nma Odu, don commend Port Harcourt-based humanitarian group, The Port Harcourt City One Love, for their strong commitment to help poor and vulnerable ...

item.title: Andy Burnham considers returning to Parliament to contest Labour leadership
item.description: Reports suggest that Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Greater Manchester, is contemplating a return to Westminster with the intention of challenging Keir Starmer for the leadership of the Labour Party. Burn...

item.title: DNA study suggests Christopher Columbus may have Galician noble ancestry
item.description: A recent DNA study examining the remains of Christopher Columbus' direct descendants suggests the famed explorer may have originated from Galician nobility in Spain rather than from Genoa, Italy, as t...

item.title: Canadian Hockey League ranks Mario Lemieux as top player in junior hockey history
item.description: The Canadian Hockey League (CHL) has released its all-time Top 50 list of players, naming Mario Lemieux as the greatest player in major junior hockey history. The Montreal native, who starred with the...

item.title: Meet Tori Moraga: Cheerleader Turned Medical Sales Specialist Supporting NFL Star Ricky Pearsall
item.description: Tori Moraga, popularly known as Ricky Pearsall’s girlfriend, has become well-known in sports circles, not just for her relationship with the NFL wide receiver but also for her own achievements. Born a...

item.title: Israeli Official Condemns Lamine Yamal for Displaying Palestinian Flag During Barcelona Victory Parade
item.description: Barcelona teenager Lamine Yamal sparked controversy after waving a Palestinian flag during the team's victory parade following their Spanish league title win. The open-top bus parade drew an estimated...

item.title: Tanzania Starts Electric Vehicle Operations to Promote Sustainable Transport
item.description: Tanzania’s Ministry of Energy officially launched Dow Elef Auto EV (ZERA) in Dar es Salaam on March 6, 2026, as part of the government’s drive to introduce clean and modern transport solutions. The la...

item.title: Court Orders Psychiatric Panel to Assess KNH Murder Suspect, Possible Referral to South Africa
item.description: Nairobi — The case of Kennedy Kalombotole, accused of killing two patients at Kenyatta National Hospital in February and July 2025, has taken a new turn. The court has called for a fresh psychiatric e...

item.title: Geelong Cats dominate Brisbane Lions in commanding win
item.description: The Geelong Cats have reinforced their reputation as a powerhouse in the AFL, demolishing the reigning premiers, Brisbane Lions, by 41 points at the Gabba. Coming just five days after a strong win ove...
